473 N0410D_HPNTC_DAY_NUM N0410D_HPNTC_DAY_NUM N0410D Medications Received: Hypnotic Number Days CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received hypnotic medication in the past seven days or since admission/reentry if less than seven days. 0 Minimum
